code: const createTrashService=authenticatedFetch=>({async fetchTrashFiles(){let response;try{response=await authenticatedFetch("/trash");}catch(error){throw new Error(error.message==="Failed to fetch"?"Trash is temporarily unavailable. Deploy or enable the /trash API for this environment.":error.message);}const data=await response.json();if(!response.ok){throw new Error(data.message||"Failed to load trash files.");}return data.files||[];},async restoreFile(fileId){const response=await authenticatedFetch("/restore",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify({fileId})});const data=await response.json();if(!response.ok){throw new Error(data.message||"Failed to restore file.");}return data;},async permanentlyDeleteFile(fileId){const response=await authenticatedFetch("/delete",{method:"DELETE",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify({fileId,permanent:true})});const data=await response.json();if(!response.ok){throw new Error(data.message||"Failed to permanently delete file.");}return data;}});export default createTrashService;
